title: schizonepeta annua
intro: Schizonepeta annua, also known as Jing Jie or Nama Shoji, is a flowering plant in the mint family, native to China and Japan. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Schizonepeta annua include reducing fever, alleviating headaches and body aches, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds and flu. Schizonepeta annua is typically prepared as a decoction, tincture, or tea, and can also be found in capsule or powder form, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
